x-enumeration-literals.name: Requested
x-enumeration-literals.description: The arrangement has been initiated or asked for, but no formal action or evaluation has taken place yet.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Proposed
x-enumeration-literals.description: The arrangement has been initiated or asked for, but no formal action or evaluation has taken place yet.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Offered
x-enumeration-literals.description: The arrangement has been formally presented to the relevant party for acceptance or rejection.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Accepted
x-enumeration-literals.description: The offered arrangement has been agreed to by all required parties and is approved to proceed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cancelled
x-enumeration-literals.description: The arrangement has been withdrawn before completion, either by the provider or the recipient.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fulfilled
x-enumeration-literals.description: The arrangement has been fully executed and all obligations or conditions have been completed successfully.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Terminated
x-enumeration-literals.description: The arrangement has been ended before its natural completion, usually due to specific conditions, breaches, or mutual agreement.
